name: QUAKER CHEMICAL CORP
summary: . General Description The Company was organized in 1918 and incorporated as a Pennsylvania business corporation in 1930. Quaker Houghton is the global leader in industrial process fluids. With a robust presence around the world, including operations in over 25 countries, the Companys customers include thousands of the worlds most advanced and specialized steel, aluminum, automotive, aerospace, offshore, can, mining, and metalworking companies.
